title: Implement transcript_2 helper function matching Python and RFC 9528 test vectors
description: Add fn transcript_2(g_y: &[u8; 32], msg1: &[u8]) -> Result<[u8; 32], EdhocError> that computes H(G_Y || H(msg1)) using compute_th with proper input construction. Match test vector in rfc9529_signature_trace_vectors. Use test/vectors/ for validation.
